channel.title: +मानसतरङ्गिणीकृच्-चरित्रम् on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +मानसतरङ्गिणीकृच्-चरित्रम् on Vishvas's notes

item.title: आत्म-परिचयाः
item.description: Source: geocities cache Whom do I descend from? From the redoubtable bhR^igu, atharvAn (paternally) and an~girasa (maternally) from the land of the bhAratas (India). What do I do for my living? I study protein sequences using computational methods and draw far-reaching conclusions regarding the origin of and evolution of all living organisms. My interests: I am mainly interested in the evolution of Life, especially proteins. 2)Other interests: Observational Astronomy Vertebrate and Insect Anatomy Central Asian and Indian (Hindu) history
